title: Hypervisor
html:
#∆

A hypervisor (or also called virtual machine monitor, VMM, virtualizer) is a computer software, firmware or hardwares that creates and runs virtual machines.

What are the main classification of Hypervisor types? ? Native & Hosted

What you have to notes about the Type-1 and Type-2 classification of Hypervisor types?:: The distinction is not always clear.
